sentences.arabic: تَتَّسِمُ الرِّحْلَةُ إِلَى الْأَرْدُنِّ بِتَنَوُّعِ مَنَاظِرِهَا الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ، مِنَ الْبَادِيَةِ الصَّحْرَاوِيَّةِ إِلَى شَوَاطِئِ الْبَحْرِ الْأَحْمَرِ.
sentences.translation: Putovanje u Jordan odlikuje se raznolikošću prirodnih prizora, od pustinjske stepe do obala Crvenog mora.
sentences.translationEn: A trip to Jordan is characterised by the diversity of its natural landscapes, from the desert steppe to the shores of the Red Sea.
